case_title: NIANTIC HOLDINGS, LLC VS. MATEO ADVISORS, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS AND DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIANTIC HOLDINGS, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NIANTIC HOLDINGS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATEO ADVISORS, LLC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 582 MARKET STREET, SUITE #606-607, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94104, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY $8,790.00 RENT, $2,884.96 ATTORNEY FEES, $811.00 COSTS, $5,158.04 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,644.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT [CCP 585(D)] FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIANTIC HOLDINGS, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIANTIC HOLDINGS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MATEO ADVISORS, LLC DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF LAURA L. CAMPBELL RE: LOST ORIGINAL LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIANTIC HOLDINGS, LLC
MINUTE ORDER RE: MINUTE ORDER DENYING WITHOUT PREJUDICE SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT BY POSTING AND MAILING
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIANTIC HOLDINGS, LLC
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (ENDORSED COPY RETURNED IN SASE)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIANTIC HOLDINGS, LLC SERVED JUL-13-2018, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $811.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MATEO ADVISORS, LLC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE / DECLARATION OF LAURA L. CAMPBELL RE: RENTAL VALUE OF $97.66 FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIANTIC HOLDINGS, LLC
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIANTIC HOLDINGS, LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIANTIC HOLDINGS, LLC SERVED JUL-13-2018, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT MATEO ADVISORS, LLC
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIANTIC HOLDINGS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MATEO ADVISORS, LLC
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF NIANTIC HOLDINGS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MATEO ADVISORS, LLC
